info.title: Capital.com Trading API
info.description: Capital.com public REST API for trading CFDs and spread betting. Provides session management, account information, position and order management, market data, price history, client sentiment, and watchlists.

get.description: Retrieve current server time. No authentication required.
Obtain RSA public key for password encryption.

post.description: Initiate a trading session. Rate limited to 1 request/second.

200.description: Session created. CST and X-SECURITY-TOKEN returned in response headers.

put.description: Switch the active trading account for the current session.

get.description: Retrieve account settings including leverage and hedging mode.

post.description: Adjust demo account balance. Rate limited to 10 requests/second, 100 requests/account/day.

get.description: Account activity log. Max date range is 1 day.

post.description: Open a new trading position. Rate limited to 1000 requests/hour on demo.

put.description: Update stop loss and take profit levels on an existing position.

post.description: Create a pending working order. Rate limited to 1000 requests/hour on demo.

get.description: Get detailed information for a specific market instrument.
Get sub-categories within a market navigation node.
Retrieve historical OHLC price data for an instrument.
Confirm execution of a position or order.
Aggregate client sentiment data across markets.

get.summary: Get client sentiment for a market

cstToken.name: CST
cstToken.description: Client session token obtained from POST /session

securityToken.name: X-SECURITY-TOKEN
securityToken.description: Account security token obtained from POST /session

capApiKey.name: X-CAP-API-KEY
capApiKey.description: Capital.com API key for session creation
